lessons.title: 周末你有什么打算
lessons.title_en: What's your plan for the weekend

lessons.title: 他什么时候回来
lessons.title_en: When will he come back
notes: 两个动作连续发生：V₁了……就V₂……

lessons.title: 桌子上放着很多饮料
lessons.title_en: There are plenty of drinks on the table
notes: 存在的表达：Location Word + V着 + Numeral + Measure Word + N

lessons.title: 她总是笑着跟客人说话
lessons.title_en: She always smiles when talking to customers

lessons.title: 我最近越来越胖了
lessons.title_en: I am getting fatter and fatter lately

lessons.title: 怎么突然找不到了
lessons.title_en: Why are they suddenly missing
notes: 可能补语: V得/不 + Complements of Possibility

lessons.title: 我跟她都认识五年了
lessons.title_en: I've known her for five years

lessons.title: 你去哪儿我就去哪儿
lessons.title_en: I'll go wherever you go

lessons.title: 她的汉语说得跟中国人一样好
lessons.title_en: She speaks Chinese like a native

lessons.title: 数学比历史难多了
lessons.title_en: Maths is much harder than history
notes: 比较句2: A比B + Adj + 一点儿/一些/得多/多了

lessons.title: 别忘了把空调关了
lessons.title_en: Don't forget to turn off the air conditioner

lessons.title: 把重要的东西放在我这儿吧
lessons.title_en: Leave the important items with me

lessons.title: 我是走回来的
lessons.title_en: I walked back

lessons.title: 你把水果拿过来
lessons.title_en: Please bring the fruit here
notes: “把”字句3: A把B+V+结果补语/趋向补语

lessons.title: 其他都没什么问题
lessons.title_en: The rest of them are all OK

lessons.title: 我现在累得下了班就想睡觉
lessons.title_en: I am so tired that I want to do nothing but sleep after work

lessons.title: 谁都有办法看好你的“病”
lessons.title_en: Everybody is able to cure your 'disease'

lessons.title: 我相信他们会同意的
lessons.title_en: I believe they'll agree

lessons.title: 你没看出来吗
lessons.title_en: Didn't you recognise him

lessons.title: 我被他影响了
lessons.title_en: I've been influenced by him

culture_sections.title_en: What Chinese People Wear on Their Wedding Days

culture_sections.title_en: What Food Chinese People Eat on Their Birthdays

common_sayings.pinyin: Bú dào Chángchéng fēi hǎohàn
common_sayings.translation: He who has never been to the Great Wall is not a true man

common_sayings.saying: 饭后百步走，活到九十九
common_sayings.pinyin: Fàn hòu bǎi bù zǒu, huó dào jiǔ shí jiǔ
common_sayings.translation: A walk after dinner makes one live to 99

common_sayings.pinyin: Chá hǎo kè cháng lái
common_sayings.translation: Good tea attracts frequenters

common_sayings.pinyin: Wǔshí bù xiào bǎi bù
common_sayings.translation: The one who retreated 50 steps laughs at the one who retreated 100

common_sayings.pinyin: Yào dào bìng chú
common_sayings.translation: The minute the medicine is used, the disease is cured

common_sayings.pinyin: Wàn shì kāitóu nán
common_sayings.translation: The first step is always the hardest

common_sayings.pinyin: Yí bù zǒu cuò bù bù cuò
common_sayings.translation: One wrong move makes all moves wrong

common_sayings.pinyin: Zhàn de gāo, kàn de yuǎn
common_sayings.translation: The higher you stand, the farther you'll see

common_sayings.pinyin: Sān rén xíng, bì yǒu wǒ shī
common_sayings.translation: When I walk with two others, there must be one whom I can learn from

common_sayings.pinyin: Bù kě tóng rì ér yǔ
common_sayings.translation: The two cannot be mentioned in the same breath

common_sayings.pinyin: Guìrén duō wàng shì
common_sayings.translation: Great wits have short memories

common_sayings.pinyin: Xíguàn chéng zìrán
common_sayings.translation: Habit is a second nature

common_sayings.pinyin: Lǐ qīng qíngyì zhòng
common_sayings.translation: Small as it is, the gift conveys deep affection

common_sayings.pinyin: Xiān dào xiān dé
common_sayings.translation: First come, first served

common_sayings.pinyin: Yī shì yī, èr shì èr
common_sayings.translation: Call a spade a spade

common_sayings.pinyin: Qián bú shì wàn néng de
common_sayings.translation: Money is not omnipotent

common_sayings.pinyin: Zǎo shuì zǎo qǐ shēntǐ hǎo
common_sayings.translation: Keeping early hours is good for your health

common_sayings.pinyin: Jiàn guài bú guài
common_sayings.translation: One has become inured to the unusual

common_sayings.pinyin: Bǎi wén bù rú yí jiàn
common_sayings.translation: To see something once is better than to hear about it a hundred times

common_sayings.pinyin: Chē dào shān qián bì yǒu lù
common_sayings.translation: The cart will find its way round the hill when it gets there

vocabulary.meaning: used at the end of a sentence to indicate confirmation or defense
used for things with a handle
used to indicate the passive voice
used to connect an adverbial modifier and the verb it modifies
to ease one's mind, to rest assured
to care for, to be interested in
to be afraid, to be scared
to draw, to paint; drawing, painting
a respectful measure word for people
indicating two actions taking place at the same time
to come across, to run into
used for flat objects such as paper, photos, etc.

words_not_in_syllabus.meaning: to hold (a meeting, an event, etc.)

supplementary_words.meaning: just, only a short while ago
a measure word used for sentences
to hear about, to be told
(used to ask for a solution) what to do
